channel.title: AI Safety on RockB
channel.description: Recent content in AI Safety on RockB

item.title: Agentic AI Explained: Why Autonomous AI Agents Are the Biggest Trend of 2026
item.description: Agentic AI is AI that acts, not just answers. In 2026, autonomous agents are handling customer service, fraud detection, and supply chains — here is what they are, how they work, and what can go wrong.
